result.name: Princess’s pea
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 3 Form: Dried pea that was previously slept on Effect: For one hour per cypher level, allows the user to recognize disguises, optical illusions, sound mimicry, false claims, and other such tricks (for all senses) for what they are.

sections.name: Princess’s pea
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 3

Form: Dried pea that was previously slept on

Effect: For one hour per cypher level, allows the user to recognize disguises, optical illusions, sound mimicry, false claims, and other such tricks (for all senses) for what they are.
